summary: Crisp, clean recording of a scorching June‑19‑1994 Eugene show highlighted by a monster Other One and fiery Scarlet > Fire second set.
review: The performance is remembered for an epic second set – the Other One, Scarlet > Fire and Knockin' on Heaven's Door all get high marks – with most fans calling it one of the best shows of the year.  The source sounds remarkably clear and clean, though a few reviewers note a slightly “venue‑like” coloration; overall the audio is very listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviews (7 of 9) are 4‑5 stars praising both the music and the recording; only a few note minor flaws, giving an overall strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Several reviewers call the audio crisp, clean and very listenable; one mentions a slight venue‑like coloration but no major dropouts or balance issues are reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A thunder‑long second set that builds energy with the Other One and Scarlet > Fire, delivering a high‑octane climax; the first set is described as uneven by some listeners.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for reverb‑drenched vocals on Dark Star and strong guitar leads; his final performance of Knockin' on Heaven's Door noted as emotionally significant.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass described as “bouncing around” the room and full of fun, especially during the Other One; fans mention hanging out in the Phil Zone.
